message:
fix: distributed agent hangs forever if streaming task exits early

The select! only waited for SIGINT/SIGTERM. If the streaming task
exited early (e.g., DB seeding failure), the process blocked forever.

Fix: Add distributed_task as a select! branch. Inner anyhow::Result
now inspected and logged at error level.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
